intent: Execute Illumina DNA Prep library preparation protocol with configurable sample throughput (8x, 16x, or 24x). Perform tagmentation by adding 20µL TAG mix to samples, incubate at 55°C for 15 minutes, then add 10µL TSB buffer and incubate at 37°C for 15 minutes. Conduct magnetic bead purification with three 100µL TWB washes, followed by PCR amplification with 40µL PCR mastermix and 10µL indexed barcodes. Execute thermocycler program: 68°C/3min, 98°C/3min, then 5 cycles of 98°C/45s, 62°C/30s, 68°C/2min, final extension 68°C/1min. Perform AMPure XP cleanup (0.8x ratio, 40µL beads) with two 150µL ethanol washes, air dry, and elute in 32µL RSB buffer. Transfer final 20-30µL purified libraries to clean wells.

commands.message: THIS IS A NO MODULE RUN
THIS PROTOCOL WILL REUSE TIPS FOR WASHES
SETTING THERMO and TEMP BLOCK Temperature
